scope: A-FORGE VPS tri-organ lattice runtime wiring

components_forged.name: IntentRouter
components_forged.capability: Classifies intent → GEOX (physical) vs WEALTH (resource) vs CODE. 60+ keywords, uncertainty bands, routing confidence.

components_forged.name: PipelineCoordinator
components_forged.capability: Full 000→999 pipeline: 000_INIT → 111_SENSE → 222_THINK → 333_MIND → 444_ROUTE → 555_HEART → 666_ALIGN → 777_FORGE → 888_JUDGE → 999_VAULT. Wires ArifOSKernel, GEOXEngine, WealthEngine into AgentEngine flow.

components_forged.name: ArifOSKernel
components_forged.capability: Manages metabolic state transitions. Validates state sequence. Injects routing context, GEOX scenarios, WEALTH allocations into session contract.

components_forged.name: GEOXEngine
components_forged.capability: generateScenarios() invoked at 333_MIND when GEOX is primary or secondary organ. Returns GEOXScenarioContract[] with physical constraints and ESTIMATE/HYPOTHESIS tags.

components_forged.name: WealthEngine
components_forged.capability: allocate() invoked at 333_MIND when WEALTH is primary or secondary organ. Returns WealthAllocationContract[] with EMV/NPV-style ROI, maruah scores, reversibility.

pipeline_stages_now_wired: 444_ROUTE — PipelineCoordinator.route() injects context into ArifOSKernel, builds candidate wavefunction
555_HEART — Red-team filter: F6 maruah check (environmentalImpact > 0.6), F8 grounding (HYPOTHESIS needs evidence)
777_FORGE — Full tool execution loop with OPS/777 thermodynamic gate, routing context injected into prompt
888_JUDGE — Escalation to human expert for HOLD/SABAR on high/critical risk
999_VAULT — FileVaultClient.seal() with full telemetry (dS, peace², ψ_le, W³, G)
gaps_remaining: GEOX runtime tools (GEOX_check_hazard etc.) — engine stub exists, actual tool implementations needed
WEALTH runtime tools (wealth_evaluate_ROI etc.) — engine stub exists, actual tool implementations needed
SealService not yet wired in PipelineCoordinator
333_MIND only 2 strategy candidates (ParallelPlannerContract) — not N-candidate EXPLORE

tri_organ_status.WEALTH: WealthEngine stub now wired, 0 runtime tools
